blocks.name: Warm-up & Activation
blocks.notes: Targeted to session focus. Gets joints and CNS ready.

blocks.name: Hypertrophy Superset A
blocks.notes: Push, pull and lower body covered. No equipment conflicts between exercises.

blocks.name: Hypertrophy Superset B
blocks.notes: Different emphasis to Superset A. Mobility drill in rest period after each set.

blocks.name: Arms + Core
blocks.notes: Flow through the 3 exercises, then rest. Clients expect this — keep it.

blocks.name: Conditioning Finisher
blocks.notes: Battle rope, KB complex or loaded carry. Must differ across all 3 sessions.

blocks.name: Buffer
blocks.notes: Equipment setup, transitions, coaching cues. Always account for this.

mobility_rules: Mobility sits inside the rest period — after completing all exercises in a superset
NOT between individual exercises within a superset
Dynamic drills only mid-session — no static holds over 15 seconds
1-2 drills per superset — relevant to the joints being loaded
Static stretching only at cool-down if time allows
loading_principles: 10-15 reps for accessory and isolation work
2-4 second eccentric (lowering phase) — tempo does the work, not load
Progress load only when form is perfect across all sets
Finishers: 5 minutes maximum — one thing, full effort
